subcodes.first_line: O noble Lady! It was our hope that during this winter thou wilt make a trip to Haifa in order to spend thy days for some time... ...The emancipation of women is a principle of the principles of the religion of God; for this reason I summoned the blessed leaf, Rouha, to Paris
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانم محترمه در این زمستان ما را امید چنان بود که بحیفا سفر نماای و مدتی در
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
